creator: mikhail.rokhin@gmail.com
text:
py-cairo fails with: Could not find the python development headers
when python2.7 compiled with -march

How-To-Repeat: compile python 2.7 with -march=corei7 then py-cairo and watch error log. Falsely, py-cairo takes all the keys from python compilation, for e.g. it sets -march=corei7 and -mtune=corei7 when compiles conf. tests and fails to do so.
